meaning: n.(瑞士市镇尼翁制造的)尼翁陶器
examples: The draw for the quarter-finalmatches was held Friday morning at UEFA headquarters in Nyon, Switzerland.
The draw for the quarter-final matches was held Friday morning at UEFA headquarters in Nyon, Switzerland.
